CustomField.description: Will trigger an automation to review all household members (for household) and automatically update the greetings and salutations. Can also be used for Person Accounts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Will trigger an automation to review all household members (for household) and automatically update the greetings and salutations. Can also be used for Person Accounts.
CustomField.label: Update Greetings Salutations
